_provenance.note: Despite the date params, the API returned each name's FULL action history. Below is the price-relevant subset (all capital_increase actions + the snapshot-year dividend) plus summary. Re-fetch for the complete list.

_golden_master.backs: Ground truth for the M1 back-adjustment masters (ohlcv_EREGL_2024-11.json, ohlcv_ASELS_2023-08.json) and for total-return construction (cash dividends added on top of back-adjusted bars).
key_facts: EREGL capital_increase (rights/bedelli) ex-date 2024-11-27 == the EREGL OHLCV snapshot date -> price series shows no gap -> back-adjusted.
ASELS capital_increase (rights/bedelli) ex-date 2023-08-25 == the ASELS OHLCV snapshot date -> same conclusion.
Some capital_increase rows have empty ex-date strings — the ingestion adapter must handle blank/garbage dates without fabricating (drop+log, never guess).
